details.test: Task 1: Book weekday evening Botox consultation at Downtown clinic
Task 2: Add vitamin C serum products to cart using filters
Task 3: Choose affordable Full Legs + Bikini LHR package and request consultation
Task 4: Create wishlist with face treatment, body-contouring, and skincare membership
Task 5: Compare acne/injectables dermatologists and book with more experienced
Task 6: Create multi-treatment cost estimate (face + body + optional skincare add-on)
Task 7: Buy $250 Mother's Day email gift card
Task 8: Register for free anti-aging skincare webinar
Task 9: Contact Uptown clinic about Saturday hours
